goal: 修复 show JSON 同时暴露物化视图

summary.title: 兼容暴露 show 物化视图
summary.what: 调整 Service.Show 的读取顺序：当本地 draft cache 和 materialized IntentView 同时存在时，继续返回 intent/turns 兼容旧 JSON 消费者，同时额外返回 view，让调用方可读取 summary、code_commit、publication 等物化字段；补充回归测试覆盖该 no-breaking 行为。
summary.why: int_afac7e68 已经在 materialized view 中有 published/proposed 记录，但 show 先命中本地 proposed draft，导致只读到 .data.intent 而看不到物化 summary/code_commit/publication。直接移除 intent 会 breaking；兼容地追加 view 可以修复新消费者体验且不破坏旧脚本。
summary.user_goal: 修复 show JSON 同时暴露物化视图

decisions.chose: 保留本地 draft 的 .data.intent/.data.turns，并在物化视图存在时额外返回 .data.view。
decisions.rationale: 旧消费者可能已经依赖 intent 字段；额外暴露 view 是 additive change，满足 no breaking change。
这次问题的 shell/Python 用法部分是特殊案例，不应作为主 workflow skill 的长期规则；CLI 行为由代码和测试锁住即可。

rejected.alternative: 让 show 在 view 存在时只返回 .data.view。
rejected.reason: 这会移除 .data.intent，对已有脚本是 breaking change。

rejected.alternative: 只在 skill 里增加 .data.view // .data.intent 和 zsh heredoc 说明。
rejected.reason: 这会把一次特殊 agent 用法问题固化成 workflow 文案补丁，没有修复 show 输出中物化视图被 cache 遮住的产品问题。

review_notes: Focused verification passed: go test ./internal/engine -run TestShow -count=1.

Smoke verification passed: go run . show int_afac7e68 --json now returns both data.intent and data.view for the proposed/materialized intent, with publication=published and code_commit=28bb19f2eee154ae8c192b7153ef7133d6861566.
No skill file changes are included in this follow-up commit.

architectural_claims: ShowResult remains a union-compatible JSON shape: draft data stays available under intent/turns, and materialized data is exposed under view when available.
Terminal materialized views still override stale local draft cache as before.
behavioral_changes: mainline show --json can now include both data.intent and data.view when a sealed/proposed local draft cache coexists with a materialized view.
Existing consumers that read data.intent for non-terminal local cache continue to work.
migration_notes: No migration required; the JSON change is additive for affected show results.
